docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
